module-2-study-checker-project.label: PwojĆØ Modil: Bati yon VerifikatĆØ Etid
module-2-study-checker-project.summary: Yon antrenĆØ etid vle yon sĆØl verifikatĆØ ki vin pi entelijan etap pa etap. Kontinye ajoute rĆØg nan menm pwogram nan jiskaske li ka jere kĆ²d ki manke, move nĆ²t, ak mesaj estati final yo.

sketch0.title: Premye kliyan ou ki baze sou rĆØg

mp-1-check-pass-fail.title: KĆ²manse rĆØg nĆ²t la
mp-1-check-pass-fail.prompt: KĆ²manse verifikatĆØ etid la ak yon sĆØl rĆØg senp. Li yon nĆ²t antye. Enprime `Pass` si nĆ²t la omwen 70. Sinon enprime `Try again`.
mp-1-check-pass-fail.hint: KonvĆØti antre a, apre sa chwazi ant de sĆ²ti.

help.concept: PwojĆØ a kĆ²manse ak rĆØg itil ki pi senp la: li yon nĆ²t epi chwazi youn nan de mesaj.
help.hint_1: SĆØvi ak `int(input())` pou konparezon an sĆØvi ak nimewo.
help.hint_2: Se yon sĆØl mesaj ki dwe enprime.

mp-1-check-pass-fail.starterCode: # Read one score and print Pass or Try again.

mp-2-check-join-rule.title: Ajoute rĆØg antre a
mp-2-check-join-rule.prompt: Kenbe lide verifikatĆØ ki baze sou nĆ²t la, men ajoute yon lĆ²t rĆØg. Li `member` ak `input()`. Enprime `Join` sĆØlman lĆØ nĆ²t la omwen 70 epi `member` egzakteman `yes`. Sinon enprime `Wait`.
mp-2-check-join-rule.hint: SĆØvi ak `and` pou toude kondisyon yo dwe vre.

help.concept: Etap sa a elaji menm verifikatĆØ a ak yon dezyĆØm kondisyon olye pou kĆ²manse yon nouvo egzĆØsis depi nan kĆ²mansman.
help.hint_1: NĆ²t la toujou enpĆ²tan, men kounye a manm lan enpĆ²tan tou.
help.hint_2: Si youn nan pati yo echwe, sĆ²ti a dwe `Wait`.

mp-2-check-join-rule.starterCode:
score = int(input())
if score >= 70:
    print("Pass")
else:
    print("Try again")

# Keep the score rule idea.
# Read member with input().
# Print Join only when the score is at least 70 and member is yes.

mp-3-handle-missing-text.title: Jere yon kĆ²d ki manke
mp-3-handle-missing-text.prompt: Kenbe verifikatĆØ Join/Wait ou deja bati a. Ajoute yon lĆ²t antre ki rele `code`. Si `code` se yon chĆØn vid, enprime `Missing code` anvan ou tcheke rĆØg nĆ²mal Join/Wait la.
mp-3-handle-missing-text.hint: Tcheke ka kĆ²d ki manke a an premye, apre sa pase nan rĆØg anvan an.

help.concept: Yon verifikatĆØ ki konekte grandi lĆØ li jere ka espesyal yo anvan rĆØg pi laj la ki deja mache.
help.hint_2: Si kĆ²d la manke, okenn lĆ²t mesaj pa dwe enprime.

mp-3-handle-missing-text.starterCode:
score = int(input())
member = input()
if score >= 70 and member == "yes":
    print("Join")
else:
    print("Wait")

# Keep the Join/Wait rule.
# Read one more input named code.
# If code is empty, print Missing code before the normal rule.

mp-4-build-final-study-checker.title: Fini verifikatĆØ konplĆØ a
mp-4-build-final-study-checker.prompt:
Kenbe menm twa antre yo nan menm lĆ²d la: score, member, code. Kounye a fini verifikatĆØ a ak rĆØg sa yo:
- `Missing code` si `code` vid
- `Invalid score` si nĆ²t la pi piti pase 0
- `Join club first` si `member` pa `yes`
- `Excellent` si nĆ²t la omwen 90
- `Passing` si nĆ²t la omwen 70
- `Needs practice` sinon
mp-4-build-final-study-checker.hint: Kenbe ka espesyal yo an premye, apre sa fini ak entĆØval nĆ²t nĆ²mal yo.

help.concept: VĆØsyon final la kenbe menm estrikti verifikatĆØ a epi ajoute branch ki pi klĆØ nan lĆ²d yon pwogram reyĆØl ta bezwen yo.
help.hint_1: SĆØvi ak yon sĆØl chĆØn `if` / `elif` / `else` pou se yon sĆØl rezilta ki enprime.
help.hint_2: Branch kĆ²d ki manke ak nĆ²t ki pa valab yo dwe vini anvan branch estati yo.

mp-4-build-final-study-checker.starterCode:
score = int(input())
member = input()
code = input()
if code == "":
    print("Missing code")
elif score >= 70 and member == "yes":
    print("Join")
else:
    print("Wait")

# Keep the same inputs.
# Add invalid-score and not-a-member checks before the normal score results.
# Then print the final status message.

try-module-2-study-checker-project-sketc.title: Gade verifikatĆØ a davans
try-module-2-study-checker-project-sketc.prompt: Li yon nĆ²t. Enprime `Ready` si li omwen 50. Sinon enprime `Keep going`.

help.concept: Ti apĆØsi rapid sa a montre modĆØl debaz ki dĆØyĆØ pi gwo pwojĆØ a: li yon valĆØ, teste yon rĆØg, epi enprime yon rezilta ki koresponn.

try-module-2-study-checker-project-sketc.starterCode: # Read one score and print Ready or Keep going.

try_module_2_study_checker_project_sketc.title: Eseye li ou menm
try_module_2_study_checker_project_sketc.prompt: Li yon nĆ²t. Enprime `Ready` si li omwen 50. Sinon enprime `Keep going`.

sketch-1.title: Premye kliyan ou ki baze sou rĆØg
sketch-1.bodyMarkdown:
Yon antrenĆØ etid kontinye ap pran menm desizyon yo alamen: ĆØske yon nĆ²t ase wo, ĆØske yon kĆ²d manke, oswa ĆØske yon elĆØv bezwen yon lĆ²t pwochen etap? Li vle yon ti verifikatĆØ Python ki vin yon ti jan pi entelijan chak fwa ou amelyore li.

PwojĆØ modil sa a fĆØt pou bay yon sans koneksyon. Ou kĆ²manse ak yon sĆØl rĆØg, apre sa ou kenbe menm verifikatĆØ a epi ajoute plis branch jiskaske vĆØsyon final la jere ka reyĆØl yo aklĆØ.
